RT @PeterDiamandis: We are the ARCHITECTS of TOMORROW!

Kimi Code、DeepSeek Harness 最好尽早做 GUI，尽早支持好办公任务，做通用 Agent。

卷 TUI 卷 Coding 没前途，当然 Coding 是基础能力，如果 Coding 都做不好其他任务也不会做得好。

ChatGPT 的 Translate 功能做的不像是一个前沿 AI 团队的作品，像 10 年前的互联网产品经理设计的水平，ChatGPT 团队会被 Codex 团队合并不是没有理由的。

https://t.co/jrbValZDJ5
Do it ASAP https://t.co/PAOGuVeNMx

通用 Agent 就是未来的操作系统了，就像现在我们操作电脑需要借助操作系统，以后我们跟 AI 通信会通过 Agent OS。

App 会有几种结局：
- 消亡：Agent 自己就有能力，不需要独立的 App
- 变成 CLI 或者 MCP：搭配 Skill 去让 Agent 调用，用户不需要直接操作 App，Agent 帮助调用
- Agent GUI https://t.co/yRtA8ZBdsz
昨天不重置明天要重置🙄

Everyone is comparing Seedance 2.0 and Gemini Omni Flash side by side.

They're missing the point.

Sure, Omni might not be as good as Seedance right now, but it has one advantage... https://t.co/Z4dOnnRZjj

Omni's real advantage isn't output quality. Not yet.

It's the editing model.

Every other video AI tool works the same way: generate, don't like it, start over from scratch. Omni lets you edit the video through conversation. Change the camera angle in step 3, and it still https://t.co/wka8rI4iiH

Now here's what I'm not going to do: pretend this was flawless.

The Pro plan currently caps video generations at 3 per day. When prompting a continuation clip, the model changed character outfits and altered the first character's appearance mid-conversation.

Whether that's a

Install real expertise, not just prompts.

In 1999, Musk co-founded https://t.co/DbuiKzLJfz, an online financial services and e-mail payment company.[74]The startup was one of the first federally insuredonline banks, and, in its initial months of operation, over 200,000 customers joined the

分享一篇调研报告《2026年中国一级市场 FA（财务顾问）行业深度研究报告：市场规模、客单价与头部格局分化》

有兴趣的朋友可以阅读。
https://t.co/Fm8e9iUw0r

冷知识：结合不同轮次交易的综合佣金提成比例（综合费率约为 1.5% - 2.5%），估算中国私募股权 FA 行业的年度整体营收佣金池（Fee Pool）规模大约在 20亿 至 35亿元人民币（折合约 2.8亿 - 5亿美元）。

因此当你知道某某公司又融资 几个亿， 其中 1.5% 是给了FA的费用.
